decision.best_immediate_path: datasets/public_raster_moe_supervision_v19/dev.jsonl and locked.jsonl for cross-source raster target evaluation
decision.best_real_registry_path: datasets/cadstruct_real_world_benchmark_v3/locked.jsonl and source_heldout.jsonl for asset registry / pilot annotation planning
decision.reason: public_raster_moe_supervision_v19 already includes CubiCasa5K and FloorPlanCAD targets, while real_world_benchmark_v3 includes CubiCasa5K, CVC-FP, FloorPlanCAD and internal_real_v3 registry records but lacks direct expected_json scene_graph labels for immediate relation replay.

public_raster_moe_supervision_v19_dev.labels: raster targets by family, not full expected_json.scene_graph

public_raster_moe_supervision_v19_locked.labels: raster targets by family, not full expected_json.scene_graph

real_world_benchmark_v3_locked.labels: registry metadata only; no expected_json/targets in records

real_world_benchmark_v3_source_heldout.labels: registry metadata only; no expected_json/targets in records

recommended_eval_plan.name: cross_source_target_adapter_scout
recommended_eval_plan.goal: Build/read adapters from public_raster_moe_supervision_v19 targets into node-level evaluation tables by source and family.
recommended_eval_plan.claim: Cross-source raster target coverage/evaluation readiness, not full scene-graph relation validation.

recommended_eval_plan.name: real_registry_annotation_pilot_plan
recommended_eval_plan.goal: Sample a small balanced pilot from real_world_benchmark_v3 locked/source_heldout across cvc_fp/floorplancad/internal_real_v3 if available and define scene-graph annotation fields.
recommended_eval_plan.claim: Annotation protocol and pilot plan for SCI robustness evidence.

recommended_eval_plan.name: model_output_contains_replay_adapter
recommended_eval_plan.goal: Adapt contains policy replay to registered model/fused graph outputs, separate from expected-json oracle replay.
recommended_eval_plan.claim: Bridges current relation result toward model-output robustness.

sci2_gap_assessment.current_gap: No full cross-dataset scene-graph relation F1 because multi-source v3 registry lacks direct expected_json.scene_graph labels and public_raster has targets but no scene_graph relation contract.
sci2_gap_assessment.minimum_publishable_next: Cross-source target-level node/detector evaluation plus a small manually annotated scene-graph pilot.
sci2_gap_assessment.strong_sci2_next: Model-output validation on multi-source data plus real/industrial annotated pilot with baseline comparison.
